name: Tuna Nicoise Topping
recipeIngredient: 8 ounces cooked green beans, trimmed and cut into 1-inch pieces
1/2 cup diced peeled and seeded cucumber
6 ounces water-packed chunk white tuna, drained
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, whisk together the olive oil, red wine vinegar, salt, black pepper, and dried thyme.
2. Stir in the green beans, tomato, cucumber, and bell pepper; toss to coat thoroughly with dressing.
3. Add the tuna and diced hard-boiled egg; mix gently.
4. Cut each baked potato lengthwise, leaving a small portion at the base.
5. Mash the potato slightly using a fork, keeping some of the skins intact.
6. Spoon the tuna mixture over each potato, dividing evenly.
7. Garnish with additional diced hard-boiled egg and chopped anchovies.
Makes 4 servings. Preparation time: About 30 minutes.
